title: How to convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG (free, in your browser)

segments.voice: Got an iPhone photo that won't open on your Windows PC or Mac?

scene.headline: Won't open?
scene.sub: iPhone photo on Windows or Mac

segments.voice: It's because iPhones save photos in a special format called HEIC.
The fix is converting them to JPG. Then they open anywhere.
Here's the easiest way. Free. No signup. Nothing to install.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash heic to jpg.
Drop your photo. Click convert. Download your JPG. Done.
And your photo stays on your computer the whole time. Link's in the bio, give it a try!
